modules.title: Service Boundaries and Modularity
outcomes: Choose boundaries around ownership and change rate
Explain monolith, modular monolith, and microservice trade-offs
Spot coupling that will slow delivery later

modules.title: Design Trade-Offs
outcomes: Compare throughput, latency, cost, reliability, and complexity
Defend a design against business, operational, and staffing constraints

modules.title: Postgres Fundamentals
outcomes: Read indexes and query plans against real query shapes
Reason about transactions, isolation, and locking
Spot schema mistakes that become production bottlenecks

modules.title: Scaling Data Access
outcomes: Choose between caching, replicas, partitioning, and sharding
Understand freshness and consistency implications

modules.title: Observability
outcomes: Use logs, metrics, and traces for diagnosis, not noise
Define service health indicators that map to user impact

modules.title: Incident Response
outcomes: Triage incidents without thrashing
Reduce blast radius and restore service quickly
Write postmortems that drive real follow-up

modules.title: Failure Modes
outcomes: Understand retries, timeouts, idempotency, and partial failure
Recognize assumptions that break under latency or partition

modules.title: Consistency and Coordination
outcomes: Explain CAP-style trade-offs in practical terms
Choose acceptable consistency for a specific product need

modules.title: Stakeholder Trade-Offs
outcomes: Communicate technical risk clearly
Push back without sounding obstructive

modules.title: Reviewing AI-Generated Code
outcomes: Inspect correctness beyond surface plausibility
Catch hidden operational, security, and maintenance risk

challengeTypes.title: Quick Quiz
challengeTypes.description: Fast checks for core concepts and terminology.

challengeTypes.title: Trade-Off Challenge
challengeTypes.description: Choose an approach, defend it, then examine the consequences.

challengeTypes.title: Incident Drill
challengeTypes.description: Respond to an outage, latency spike, or data integrity issue.

challengeTypes.title: System Design Rep
challengeTypes.description: Design a system and adapt it as constraints change.

starterWeek.challenge: Choose an architecture for a small but fast-growing product
Fix a slow query for a hot production path
Diagnose a latency regression after deploy
Respond to a rushed deadline with production risk
